description: 20 known-clean cards for audio text review. Sampled from content that already passed stage-5 review-refine AND was hand-spot-checked. Used by audio_review_gold_eval.py to measure PRD SC3 (>=90% no-false-rewrite). The reviewer should return an empty revisions list for each of these.

lines.display: An even number can be split into two equal groups.
lines.audio: An even number can be split into two equal groups.

lines.display: Examples: two, four, six, eight.
lines.audio: For example, two, four, six, and eight are all even.
Count by twos. Two, four, six, eight, ten.

lines.display: Each step is 2 more than the last.
lines.audio: Each step is two more than the last.

lines.display: One half means one of two equal parts.
lines.audio: One half means one of two equal parts.

lines.display: Adding zero gives the same number back.
lines.audio: Adding zero gives the same number back.
So seven plus zero is seven.

lines.display: Subtracting means taking away from a group.
lines.audio: Subtracting means taking away from a group.

lines.display: The answer is what's left.
lines.audio: The answer is how many are left.

lines.display: A pair is two things that go together.
lines.audio: A pair is two things that go together.

lines.display: Socks come in pairs.
lines.audio: Socks come in pairs.

lines.display: Counting backwards starts from a number and goes down.
lines.audio: Counting backwards starts from a number and goes down.

lines.display: Five, four, three, two, one.
lines.audio: Five, four, three, two, one.

lines.display: The ones place is the rightmost digit.
lines.audio: The ones place is the last digit on the right.

lines.display: Thirty-two has three tens and two ones.
lines.audio: Thirty-two has three tens and two ones.

lines.display: A dozen means twelve.
lines.audio: A dozen means twelve.

lines.display: Doubling means adding the same number to itself.
lines.audio: Doubling means adding the same number to itself.

lines.display: Double three is six.
lines.audio: Double three is six.

lines.display: Halving means splitting into two equal parts.
lines.audio: Halving means splitting into two equal parts.

lines.display: Half of eight is four.
lines.audio: Half of eight is four.

lines.display: A number line shows numbers in order from small to big.
lines.audio: A number line shows numbers in order from small to big.

lines.display: Greater than means bigger than.
lines.audio: Greater than means bigger than.

lines.display: Seven is greater than five.
lines.audio: Seven is greater than five.

lines.display: Less than means smaller than.
lines.audio: Less than means smaller than.

lines.display: Three is less than nine.
lines.audio: Three is less than nine.

lines.display: Zero means none.
lines.audio: Zero means none.

lines.display: If you can share a group equally between two people, the group is even.
lines.audio: If you can share a group equally between two people, the group is even.

lines.display: Even numbers split into two equal groups.
lines.audio: Even numbers split into two equal groups.

lines.display: Odd numbers do not.
lines.audio: Odd numbers do not.

lines.display: Counting on means starting from a number and adding one each time.
lines.audio: Counting on means starting from a number and adding one each time.
